attendance.title: Attendance incidents
attendance.empty: No deductible attendance incidents this month.

delivery.title: Delivery evidence
delivery.empty: No delivery evidence is available this month.

reasons.leadTimeUnderMinimum: Less than {hours} hours from creation to deadline — excluded from the rate.
reasons.legacyUnverified: Legacy or unverified evidence — excluded from the rate.
reasons.unverifiedDeadline: Unverified legacy deadline — excluded from the rate.
reasons.missingDeadline: No exact deadline — excluded from the rate.
reasons.invalidTimestamp: Invalid deadline evidence — excluded from the rate.

quality.title: Quality evidence
quality.empty: No quality review evidence is available this month.
quality.withinBand: The current month is not below the quality warning band.
quality.warning: Quality is below the warning band for {count} consecutive month(s).
quality.eligible: A repeated pattern is documented across {count} consecutive month(s); money still requires explicit admin approval.

finalized.title: Finalized deduction for this month
finalized.evidenceTitle: Deduction case evidence needs payment verification
finalized.evidenceDescription: The case remains visible as evidence, but no finalized amount or status is shown until its payment link is valid.

manualFinalized.title: Documented manual deduction
manualFinalized.evidenceDescription: Payment link needs verification; no finalized amount or status is shown.

integrity.title: Money estimate unavailable
integrity.description: The evidence remains visible, but the system will not show a money figure until these integrity issues are resolved.

codes.historicalSalaryUnverified: The salary and currency applicable to this past month are not historically verified; evidence is shown without money.
codes.inactiveEmployee: The employee is inactive; documented deductions remain visible, but no new projection is calculated.
codes.attendanceTrackingUnverified: Attendance tracking start is not documented; the system will not invent no-shows or present them as zero.
codes.missingEffectiveMonth: An existing deduction is missing its effective month.
codes.capExemptionInvalid: An existing deduction has an invalid attendance cap-exemption split.
codes.currencyMismatch: An existing deduction uses a different currency.
codes.casePaymentMissing: The finalized deduction is missing its linked payment.
codes.casePaymentMismatch: The finalized deduction does not match its linked payment.
codes.manualPaymentMissing: A documented manual deduction is missing its linked payment.
codes.manualPaymentMismatch: A documented manual deduction does not match its linked payment.
codes.calculationFailed: The deduction projection could not be calculated safely.

manualEvidence.unavailable: The retained evidence snapshot is not in the trusted current format.
manualEvidence.legacyGuard: These legacy tasks were excluded from the automatic on-time rate because the exact deadline or historical assignee evidence was incomplete; the owner explicitly approved the documented later-day submissions.
manualEvidence.attributionUnverified: Historical assignee attribution was not verified; this item required the explicit owner attestation.
manualEvidence.qualityGuard: Explicit money decision after {count} consecutive below-band months; never auto-deducted.

page.title: Employee deductions review
page.subtitle: Review live evidence and explicitly approve documented deductions.
page.approvalGuard: Computed and at-risk figures are projections. Finalized ledger amounts are labeled separately, and nothing new reaches payroll without explicit documented approval.

error.title: Could not load deductions review
error.description: No amounts can be approved until the evidence is loaded safely.

empty.title: No deduction evidence
empty.description: There are no active employees or production and attendance evidence for this month.

attendanceTracking.title: Document attendance tracking start
attendanceTracking.description: Choose the documented date when attendance counting began for {name}.
attendanceTracking.guard: The system does not infer this from hire date or the current schedule. From this date, a workday without attendance or an excuse is a full no-show.
attendanceTracking.error: Attendance tracking start could not be documented

employee.qualityEligible: Eligible after {count} consecutive months; still manual only
employee.qualityTimingPending: Warning eligible after {count} consecutive months; money approval is paused until month timing is confirmed
employee.projectionNotice: This computed figure is for review only. The separate documented-manual action requires an amount and reason and enforces the remaining monthly ceiling.
employee.unlinkedEvidence: Documented evidence not linked to payroll (no amount shown)

computedApproval.success: The computed deduction was approved for payroll
computedApproval.error: The computed deduction could not be approved safely

cancelDialog.title: Cancel this deduction
cancelDialog.description: The original evidence stays in the audit history, but the amount is removed from payroll. A linked draft calculation will be reset safely.
cancelDialog.reasonPlaceholder: For example: approved excuse or corrected admin decision
cancelDialog.guard: A paid deduction or an approved payroll run cannot be changed.
cancelDialog.success: The deduction was cancelled and removed from payroll
cancelDialog.successRecalculate: The deduction was cancelled; recalculate the draft payroll before approval
cancelDialog.error: The deduction could not be cancelled safely

manualDialog.title: Document a deduction for {name}
manualDialog.description: This explicit approval will create a payroll deduction for {month}.
manualDialog.capNotice: The disciplinary amount must stay within the remaining {percent}% ceiling; attendance deductions do not consume it.
manualDialog.legacyTasksDescription: Only legacy tasks first submitted on a later Dubai calendar day are available. Each row states separately whether its exact deadline or historical assignee evidence was unavailable.
manualDialog.legacyTaskAttributionUnverified: Historical assignee attribution is unverified; explicit owner attestation is required.
manualDialog.ownerAttestation: I confirm this is an explicit owner decision based on the selected documented delivery delays.
manualDialog.qualityEvidence: The server documented a below-band quality pattern for {count} consecutive months. The amount remains an explicit admin decision and is never calculated automatically.
manualDialog.qualityTimingPending: The quality warning remains documented, but money approval is paused until the owner confirms whether the pattern uses the current month or completed months.
manualDialog.reasonPlaceholder: State the exact incident, decision, and supporting evidence
manualDialog.evidenceNotice: The server retains the selected basis, trusted task or quality snapshot, reason, amount, approving admin, salary snapshot, and month.
manualDialog.error: The deduction could not be approved safely

validation.overCap: The amount cannot exceed the remaining ceiling of {amount}
validation.reason: Enter the documented reason before approval
validation.tasks: Select at least one documented late delivery
validation.attestation: Confirm the explicit owner decision before approval
validation.quality: The repeated quality pattern is not eligible for a money decision

picker.label: Existing Employee

review.notesPlaceholder: Notes specific to this onboarding record...

validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least {min} characters
validation.basicSalaryRequired: Basic salary must be greater than zero

offboarding.title: End of service
offboarding.suspendConfirmBody: The employee will be blocked from signing in until reactivated. None of their data is affected.
offboarding.reactivateConfirm: The employee's account will be reactivated and sign-in allowed again.
offboarding.statusChangeFailed: Could not change the account status

handover.heading: Hand over the employee's work
handover.subheading: Reassign open work to colleagues before the account is closed
handover.externalFilesWarning: There are {count} file(s) on the employee's external account (Drive / frame.io). Request a copy before the account is closed — there is no automatic recovery.
handover.externalFilesAck: I confirm I requested a copy of the external files

confirm.heading: Final settlement
confirm.settlementAdminNote: The amount is recorded as payable — the employee is not notified automatically.

offboarding.confirmBody: This closes the employee's account and executes the handover decisions. It cannot be undone easily.
offboarding.exitDoneLocked: End of service completed and account closed successfully.
offboarding.exitDoneLockFailed: End of service done, but closing the account failed — it will retry automatically.
offboarding.handoverPartialError: End of service done, but some handover steps failed. Review them manually.
offboarding.submitFailedFallback: Could not complete the end of service
offboarding.loadErrorHint: We couldn't read the employee's work. Retry — end of service cannot proceed without fully loaded data.

errors.lastDayFuture: Last working day cannot be in the future
errors.reassignTargetRequired: Select the employee who will receive the handed-over work
